notes.text: StandardListItem: Usage of ObjectStatus for info text/state
sap.m.ObjectStatus: avoid duplicate SR output
sap.m.DynamicDateRange: week number click does not populate footer dates and enable Apply button
sap.m: Announce suggestions popover expanded/collapsed state
sap.m.ComboBoxBase: maxPickerHeight property is now added
We've now enabled video preview support for WebM, OGG, and MOV formats in the FilePreviewDialog
sap.m.Popover: Screen reader and focus handling are improved
sap.m Date & Time controls: changed the default placeholder text
We've fixed an issue where activating a Popover menu item with the keyboard caused the GenericTile to initiate an unintended press event
sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: Restore toolbar keyboard navigation in select mode
sap.m.MultiComboBox: Change event is now fired correctly
m.VariantManagement: correctly bind sharing column in manage dialog
We've now fixed an issue where GenericTile rendered role="listitem" on <a> elements
We've now fixed the FeedListItem icon size rendering by adding size-specific CSS classes and removing hardcoded avatar dimensions to support all icon sizes
sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar/PlanningCalendar: Fix NVDA appointment announcements
sap.m Date & Time controls: changed the default placeholder text
sap.m.TimePickerClock: Replace inline drag event attributes with addEventListener
p13n.SelectionPanel: fix search field announcement
sap.m.ExpandableText: Prevent focus outline clipping in tables
sap.m.Panel: add sample for background design
sap.m.ComboBox: adjust failing tests in FF
sap.m.RatingIndicator: half-value icon in readonly, displayOnly and disabled state changed
sap.m.MaskInput: remove redundant placeholder announcement
sap.m.DynamicDateOption: stretch CustomMonthPicker to full width
We now display a label next to the input field when an uploaded file is renamed
sap.m.PlanningCalendar: Add recurring appointments and non-working periods support
We've now fixed an issue where backend error messages appeared while previewing an unsaved .txt file
sap.m.Slider: focus outline added to the editable tooltips
sap.m.Button: Prevent focus on right click in firefox
sap.m.DynamicDateRange: set footer type for custom options
We now correctly apply the border-radius property to the ActionTile when focused
sap.m.IconTabBar: fix expand icon color overriding styles
sap.m.Select: move close button from header to footer on phone
sap.m.PullToRefresh: Refresh announced twice by screen reader
sap.m.Panel: Add Contrast panel background design
sap.ui.unified.CalendarAppointment: add ariaHasPopup attribute for accessibility
sap.m.InputBase: Value state is now announced without technical details
sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: focus is retrieved correctly after close popover
sap.m.Dialog: Fullscreen toggle support is now added
We've now fixed a VDS file preview error in uplaodsetwithtable plugin
sap.ui.demo.bulletinboard: stabilize OData reads in Safari OPA run
We've now fixed the up and down arrow key navigation in SearchField inside the toolbar
sap.m.TimePicker: add aria-description property
sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Now marker is not visible when today is outside of the visible date
sap.m.NavContainer: Improve sample
sap.m.Link: fix focus on mobile
We've now fixed the text spillover issue for the no-data placeholder in UploadSet
sap.m.BusyDialog: Escape key now closes the dialog when cancel button is shown
We've now fixed the scroll arrow buttons not working when a single item is larger than the HeaderContainer
sap.m.Avatar: Improve Sample
sap.m.Panel: Revert focus for Scrollable Content Area
sap.m.Avatar: IFormContent interface is now implemented
sap.m.Avatar: Show fallback icon after clearing initials
sap.m.Dialog: Initial focus in Firefox is now fixed
